  • [Entra ID‑based access for Azure Blob Storage SFTP](https://azure.microsoft.com/updates?id=558662)
  • [Azure Storage Mover private data transfers from AWS S3 to Azure Blob](https://azure.microsoft.com/updates?id=558651)
  • [Customer‑managed keys for Premium SSD v2 disks with Azure Database for PostgreSQL](https://azure.microsoft.com/updates?id=557527)
  • [Query Profiler in the MSSQL extension for Visual Studio Code](https://azure.microsoft.com/updates?id=558164)

- Launched / Generally Available:
  • [Azure Front Door and WAF Default Rule Set 2.2 with updated ruleset support policy](https://azure.microsoft.com/updates?id=558016)
  • [Foundry Agent Service for enterprise AI agents with private networking and evaluations](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/foundry/foundry-agent-service-ga/)
  • [Log Analytics summary rules add manual “Retry bin” capability](https://azure.microsoft.com/updates?id=558656)
  • [Azure Database for PostgreSQL elastic clusters now support Terraform, Bicep, and Ansible](https://azure.microsoft.com/updates?id=558140)
  • [Azure Database for PostgreSQL dashboards integration with Grafana](https://azure.microsoft.com/updates?id=558140)
  • [Azure SRE Agent with expanded reliability and operations capabilities](https://azure.microsoft.com/updates?id=558321)

- In development:
  • none noted in selected window
